name: 0z-operating-system
description: Portable project operating system for Codex workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Install a portable Codex project operating system.
interface.longDescription: 0z Operating System packages the durable operating practices from a mature Codex workspace: neutral AGENTS.md generation, local skills, safe hooks, README-first knowledge structure, source research, goal specifications, and repeatable checks. It avoids copying live user memory or secrets.
defaultPrompt: Adapt this project after my feedback.
